title: workcli lifecycle layer: noun-templated creation + guarded lifecycle verbs
description: Per work-lifecycle spec sections 4-7: work create noun templates (spike/chore/decision/spec/feat/bugfix/epic), evidence rule, blocked impl placeholder + manifest reconciliation, claim/release/deliver/plan/promote/reconcile over the transport Backend seam; status never moves except through lifecycle verbs.
acceptance_criteria: Work-lifecycle spec test plan items 1-11 pass under the same gate.
